caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt and white headphones is positioned in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom left corner of a video game interface. He is in a room with a white brick wall and a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays a purple background with the text "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" at the top. Below this, a red and gold pack icon is visible above the word "ELITE." A green button indicates a purchase option labeled "BUY WITH" and shows a cost of "20,000 Training." At the bottom of the screen, menu options read "BUY VIEW INFO HELP CANCEL." As the sequence progresses, the man's expression changes from a neutral look to an open-mouthed, surprised reaction, while the gaming interface remains static across the frames.
